name_en: M62369 Embossed (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized Custom Version! Changeable Chip, Emilie Wallet, This Emilie wallet is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather with a classic Monogram embossed pattern and finished with a soft contrasting grained leather lining. The wallet features an envelope-style flap with a matching button snap for a secure closure, revealing an organized interior with a large compartment, zippered coin pocket, and multiple card slots.
